proven.claim: PROVEN: totalProven >= 0 — it is a sum of non-negative array lengths
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 438
; PROVEN: totalProven >= 0 — it is a sum of non-negative array lengths
(declare-const proven_0 Int)   ; c.proven.length for an arbitrary contract
(declare-const total_proven Int)
; Code transition: proven.length is an array length — non-negative
(assert (>= proven_0 0))
; Code transition: totalProven initialized to 0, then += c.proven.length each iteration
; For the single-contract case: total_proven = proven_0
(assert (= total_proven proven_0))
; Negated property: total_proven < 0
(assert (< total_proven 0))
(check-sat)
